chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3465 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Katcha Peshi. 26.02.2018. Mr. Jangoo Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Lutufullah Arain, D.A.G. Mr. Fayaz Ahmed Laghari, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Saleem Laghari, Advocate for petitioner, submits that he has definite instructions from Mr. Muhammad Saleem Laghari to withdraw this petition as the petitioner Sharif Ahmed has been acquitted by the trial court, therefore, according to him this petition has become infructuous, which is liable to be disposed of. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has conceded this fact. In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed having become infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
